nasb.text: When the king’s edict which he will make is heard throughout all his kingdom, great as it is, then all women will give honor to their husbands, great and small.”

esv.text: So when the decree made by the king is proclaimed throughout all his kingdom, for it is vast, all women will give honor to their husbands, high and low alike.”

cnv.text: 王頒布的諭旨傳遍全國的時候，所有的婦女都必敬重她們的丈夫，不論丈夫尊卑貴賤。”

ccb.text: 王的谕旨传遍王辽阔的国境后，所有的妇女，无论丈夫贵贱，都必尊重他们。”
